steps.title: Find the quotation from chapter 17
steps.content: The student's stated goal is to provide a quotation from chapter 17. The notes supply a specific quotation attributed to that chapter: “The poethics of nostalgia combines estrangement and human solidarity, affect and reflection.”

steps.title: Match the quotation to the correct choice
steps.content:
Only Choice A — In a discussion of various skeptics' takes on the concept of nostalgia, Svetlana Boym writes, "The poethics of nostalgia combines estrangement and human solidarity, affect and reflection." includes the quotation provided in the notes. It contextualizes the quotation appropriately, introducing it as part of a discussion on skeptics' views—precisely what chapter 17 addresses according to the notes.

Choices B, C, and D include no quotation. That matches Choice A — In a discussion of various skeptics' takes on the concept of nostalgia, Svetlana Boym writes, "The poethics of nostalgia combines estrangement and human solidarity, affect and reflection.".
